# Primary dep: triton wheel from AMD's index, paired with the ROCm base image.
# Bump with:
#   pip index versions triton --index-url https://pypi.amd.com/triton/rocm-7.2.0/simple/
--extra-index-url https://pypi.amd.com/triton/rocm-7.2.0/simple/
triton==3.7.0+amd.rocm7.2.0.gitd1660454

# Build deps (needed for --no-build-isolation editable install).
setuptools>=45
setuptools_scm[toml]>=6.2
wheel
pybind11==3.0.1
ninja==1.11.1.4
psutil
packaging
flydsl==0.1.8

# Test deps.
pandas==2.2.3
pyzmq==26.2.0
einops==0.8.0
numpy==1.26.2
tabulate==0.9.0
pytest==8.3.4
filecheck==1.0.1
networkx==3.4.2
